summary: Harden WTS control-plane durability, idempotency, outbox lookup paths, and contract-test stability after review.
rationale: The Workbench runtime projection reads WTS outbox rows by event type and aggregate identity, and the conversation-agent submit-JD path is the durable product control-plane entrypoint for requirement extraction. This red-zone follow-up keeps outbox lookup paths bounded, repairs replayed submit-JD state, records claimable workflow-start intents, keeps requirement-review transcript snapshots available without changing raw provider payload storage policy, and stabilizes the React live-stream contract test that this stack's generated Workbench schema checks execute.
verification: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_conversation_agent_budget_policy.py tests/test_wts_control_plane.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
CI=1 pnpm --dir apps/web-react exec vitest run src/lib/api/agentWorkbenchLive.test.tsx --run

uv run --group dev ruff check src/seektalent_conversation_agent/job_request_store.py src/seektalent_conversation_agent/service.py src/seektalent_conversation_agent/store.py src/seektalent_conversation_agent/workflow_start_intents.py src/seektalent_conversation_agent/submit_jd_recovery.py tests/test_conversation_agent_budget_policy.py tests/test_wts_control_plane.py

uv run --group dev ty check src/seektalent_conversation_agent/job_request_store.py src/seektalent_conversation_agent/service.py src/seektalent_conversation_agent/store.py src/seektalent_conversation_agent/workflow_start_intents.py src/seektalent_conversation_agent/submit_jd_recovery.py tests/test_conversation_agent_budget_policy.py tests/test_wts_control_plane.py
deletion_targets: full outbox scans for workflow aggregate projection reads
submit-JD replay states that leave durable requirement drafts without a review transcript
workflow-start intents that cannot be claimed safely after process restart
React live-stream tests that leave scheduled work past jsdom teardown
risks: The migration must stay idempotent for existing local SQLite databases.
The new index must match the Workbench projection lookup shape without creating a second schema authority.
Replay repair must not create duplicate job-request links, tool calls, transcript messages, or workflow-start intents.
Requirement-review snapshots must remain recruiter-safe product state and must not store raw prompt or provider payloads.
Frontend test cleanup must remain test-only and must not change Workbench runtime behavior.
